narrative:
Marietta Twp township has 3,089 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.9 percentage points.
